source_confidence.label: High
source_confidence.notes: BRD is complete and detailed. Only gap: mockup images (Figures 1–9) referenced but not included in docx.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Patient Login with session_state
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Standard Streamlit pattern. Credentials defined: patient@example.com / patient123.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Welcome Page with quick actions
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Simple informational layout. CTAs map directly to Book Consultation and My Consultations.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Main Dashboard with 5 metric cards
feature_confidence_scores.notes: 5 metrics clearly defined. Metric computation is simple counter logic.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Book Consultation form (10 fields)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: All 10 form fields explicitly specified. Dropdown values enumerated. Submit → append to session state list.

feature_confidence_scores.name: My Consultations list display
feature_confidence_scores.notes: All display fields defined. Card or table layout both viable.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Status filter (6 values + All)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Filter values fully enumerated. Simple Python list comprehension filter.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Search by patient name, doctor, department
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Three search fields defined. Case-insensitive substring match is the natural implementation.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Status update (Requested → Scheduled → Completed)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: State mutation in session_state requires index-based update. Double-repr issue risk if st.session_state is updated post-widget creation. Requires careful implementation.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Prescription section (conditional by status)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Logic is clear: Available for Completed, Pending otherwise. Placeholder text only. Demo disclaimer required.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Sign out (clear session_state, return to login)
UI healthcare design theme
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Mockup images (Figures 1–9) not provided. Text descriptions are sufficient for a reasonable design but human review of theme is recommended before full UI generation.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Unit tests (test_app.py)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Logic functions are pure and unit-testable. ~15 test functions expected. Mocking st.session_state for logic-only tests is standard.

feature_confidence_scores.name: Playwright UI tests (ui_test.py, TC_001–TC_010)
feature_confidence_scores.notes: Streamlit widget keys can be dynamic. Must use accessible locators (getByLabel, getByRole, getByText). Chained session test (TC_001 through TC_010) must run in a single browser session. Date field handling requires special care.

unsupported_items.strategy: Use text descriptions from BRD sections 5.1–5.8 as design evidence. Apply healthcare domain design defaults. Require human design review before full UI generation.
Use st.session_state only per BRD Section 14. Acceptable for demo app.
Demo credentials only (patient@example.com / patient123) per BRD Sections 7 and 13.

unsupported_items.strategy: Placeholder text only. Demo disclaimer required per BRD Section 17.

unsupported_items.description: Multi-role support (Admin, Doctor, Support, Care Coordinator)
unsupported_items.strategy: BRD explicitly states primary user role = Patient. Other roles listed in Section 3 but no requirements defined for them.
